parameters.text:
=Write a tailored cover letter for this specific job posting. Return ONLY a JSON object (no markdown, no commentary, no surrounding text):

{
  "greeting": "Dear Hiring Team,",
  "opening": "",
  "body_paragraphs": ["", ""],
  "closing": ""
}

Rules:
- 3-4 short paragraphs total. Hiring managers skim, tight beats verbose.
- LANGUAGE: Detect the language of the JOB DESCRIPTION below and write the entire letter in that same language (greeting, opening, body, closing, sign-off). If the JD is too short or ambiguous to tell with confidence, default to English. Common cases for this app: English, Dutch (Nederlands), German. Match the language exactly, including the greeting phrasing (e.g. "Geachte heer/mevrouw," for Dutch, "Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren," for German).
- TONE: Business casual. Confident but not stiff. No corporate jargon, no "synergy", no "leveraging", no "I am writing to apply for...". Read like a thoughtful note from a peer who happens to be a strong fit.
- PUNCTUATION: NEVER use em-dashes (—) or en-dashes (–) anywhere in the letter. This is non-negotiable. Use commas, periods, colons, parentheses, or sentence breaks instead. This applies across all languages.
- Reference THIS specific posting: mention the company by name and reflect 1-2 things the JD actually asks for.
- Pull concrete evidence from the candidate's résumé: company names, project names, measurable outcomes. No vague "passionate about..." filler.
- Voice should feel like the same person who wrote the résumé, not generic AI tone.
- No fake hiring-manager names in the greeting (use the language-appropriate generic, e.g. "Dear Hiring Team," / "Geachte heer/mevrouw,").
- Closing: one sentence + sign-off. Keep it modern (no "Sincerely,").

TARGET ROLE: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.job.title }}
ORGANIZATION: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.job.company }}
LOCATION: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.job.location || 'not specified' }}

JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.job.description || '(no description provided)' }}

CANDIDATE RÉSUMÉ (JSON, use as voice + evidence source):
{{ JSON.stringify($('Webhook').item.json.body.source_resume.resume_json) }}
